top_signals.title: Powell, Acceptance Remarks
top_signals.summary: Speech For the 2026 John F. Kennedy Profile in Courage Award, John F. Kennedy Library Foundation, Boston, Massachusetts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Red-alert heatwaves are becoming Europe's new normal. Investors are paying attention
top_signals.summary: Temperature records were smashed across Europe this week, prompting several countries across the continent to issued high-level warnings about danger to life.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Excessive AI spending risks global financial consequences, BIS warns
top_signals.summary: The AI investment surge is a potential flashpoint for systemic risk, “as financing has relied on enormous debt and highly leveraged nonbank structures that can rapidly unwind,” one analyst said in response to the report.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Alebund Pharmaceuticals on Business Outlook
top_signals.summary: Gavin Xia, Co-Founder and CEO of Alebund Pharmaceuticals, speaks exclusively to Minmin Low about the Chinese biotech firm's product pipeline and strategies in domestic and overseas markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Crealights Technology on Breakeven Outlook
top_signals.summary: Chinese optical module developer Crealights will break even as soon as this year due to strong demand. The company's CEO, Hu Zhaoyang, speaks to Minmin Low after its shares began trading in Hong Kong. (Source: Bloomberg)

top_signals.title: Commissioner Tzitzikostas delivers a Speech at the "Prague–Berlin–Copenhagen: First EU pilot project for new international rail connections"
top_signals.summary:
European Commission Speech Berlin, 26 Jun 2026 Meine Damen und Herren
Ladies and Gentlemen,
 
It is a great pleasure to be with you in Berlin, on this historic day for Europe's railways. Today, we celebrate ...
